feed.title: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission — Press Releases
feed.subtitle: Official SEC press-release RSS feed (enforcement actions, rulemaking, and settlements). National in scope, not Maine-specific; included as a securities-practice resource.

entry.title: SEC Seeks Public Comment on the Consolidated Audit Trail and Other Audit Trails and Data Sources
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today issued a concept release soliciting public comment in support of a comprehensive review of the Consolidated Audit Trail (CAT) and other audit trails and related data sources currently used in the regulation of…

entry.title: SEC Small Business Advisory Committee to Explore Ways to Encourage More IPOs
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission’s Small Business Capital Formation Advisory Committee announced that it will hold a meeting on Tuesday, April 28, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. to explore ways to encourage more companies to go public.The meeting will be open…

entry.title: Chairman Atkins Launches 'Material Matters' Podcast
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today announced the launch of Material Matters With SEC Chairman Paul Atkins, a new podcast that provides stakeholders and the investing public with exclusive interviews and insights around the agency’s policy and…

entry.title: SEC and CFTC Jointly Propose Amendments to Reduce Private Fund Reporting Burdens
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) jointly proposed amendments to reduce private fund reporting burdens while enabling the continued collection of necessary and appropriate information. The…

entry.title: Deputy Director of Enforcement Jason Burt to Conclude His Tenure at the SEC
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today announced that Jason Burt, Deputy Director of the Division of Enforcement (Specialized Units), will depart the agency on May 1, 2026, after more than 22 years of public service.“Jason’s exceptional leadership…

entry.title: SEC Proposes Amendments to Permit Optional Semiannual Reporting by Public Companies
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today proposed rule and form amendments that would give public companies the option of filing semiannual reports in lieu of quarterly reports to meet their interim reporting obligations under the federal securities…

entry.title: SEC Divisions of Investment Management and Corporation Finance Issue Staff Guidance Supporting Retirement Plans for Small Businesses
entry.content: Staff in the Securities and Exchange Commission’s Divisions of Investment Management and Corporation Finance issued guidance addressing certain questions regarding the application of the federal securities laws to pooled employer plans (PEPs), which help…

entry.title: SEC Charges 21 Individuals With Alleged Wide-Reaching Insider Trading Scheme
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today charged 21 individuals for their alleged involvement in a decade-long insider trading scheme that used information misappropriated from multiple global law firms and resulted in millions of dollars in illicit…

entry.title: SEC Rescinds Policy Regarding Denials of Settlements in Enforcement Actions
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today rescinded a policy, codified in Rule 202.5(e) of its informal rules of procedures, stating that when it chooses to settle an enforcement action in which a sanction is imposed, it will not settle unless the…

entry.title: SEC Proposes Transformative Reforms to Help Public Companies Conduct Registered Offerings and Simplify Reporting Requirements
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today proposed amendments to its rules and forms governing registered offerings that are designed to increase efficiency, flexibility, and cost savings for public companies while maintaining robust investor…

entry.title: SEC and NFA Announce Memorandum of Understanding to Further Harmonize Regulatory Coordination
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission and National Futures Association (NFA) today announced that they have entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to enhance their cooperation, coordination, and information sharing in areas of common…

entry.title: SEC Investor Advisory Committee to Host June 4 Meeting
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission’s Investor Advisory Committee will hold a public meeting at the SEC Headquarters in Washington D.C. on June 4 at 10 a.m. ET to discuss private markets, passive index funds, and recommendations regarding fund…

entry.title: SEC Proposes Rescission of Climate-Related Disclosure Rules
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today proposed the rescission of overly burdensome and costly rules that require companies to provide certain climate-related information in their registration statements and annual reports. The Commission’s…

entry.title: SEC Announces Four New Members of Investor Advisory Committee
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today announced four new members to fill vacancies on its Investor Advisory Committee. Three of the four new members will serve four-year terms, while the fourth new member will serve as the…

entry.title: SEC Publishes Draft Strategic Plan for Public Comment
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today published a Draft Strategic Plan that focuses on returning the agency to the core mission set by Congress more than 90 years ago: protecting investors; maintaining fair, orderly, and efficient…

entry.title: SEC Announces New Members of Small Business Capital Formation Advisory Committee
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today announced five new members of the Small Business Capital Formation Advisory Committee. The new members were appointed to four-year terms and will join the 15 current …

entry.title: SEC Establishes Joint Data Standards as Required Under the Financial Data Transparency Act of 2022
entry.content: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission established joint data standards under the Financial Data Transparency Act of 2022. The final rule establishes technical standards for data submitted to certain financial regulatory agencies. Eight additional…

entry.title: SEC Proposes Rescission of Regulation NMS Rules 611 and 610(e)
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today proposed amendments to rescind Rules 611 and 610(e) of Regulation NMS.“After two decades of Rule 611, it is high time that the Commission review its unintended consequences that have hindered — rather than…

entry.title: SEC Appoints John Moses as Director of the Office of Investor Education and Assistance
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission has appointed John Moses as Director of the agency’s Office of Investor Education and Assistance, which provides services and resources to help investors build their financial futures and protect against investment…

entry.title: SEC, CFTC Seek Public Input on Data Reporting Frameworks for Security-Based Swap and Swap Markets
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission and Commodity Futures Trading Commission today issued a joint request for public comment on potential opportunities to harmonize, modernize, and streamline data reporting requirements in their regulation of the…

entry.title: SEC, CFTC Seek Public Comment to Further Clarify and Harmonize Derivatives Product Definitions
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission today issued a joint request for public comment on potential opportunities to further update, clarify, and harmonize certain derivatives product definitions and…

entry.title: SEC Appoints Kathleen Hutchinson as Director of Office of International Affairs
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission has appointed Kathleen M. Hutchinson as Director of the agency’s Office of International Affairs (OIA). OIA advises the Commission on international policy matters, coordinates with foreign authorities across the…

entry.title: SEC, CFTC Seek Public Comment on the Harmonization of Portfolio Margining Frameworks
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission today issued a joint request for public comment on potential approaches to further harmonize regulatory frameworks applicable to portfolio margining across securities,…

entry.title: SEC Seeks Public Comment on Novel Exchange-Traded Funds
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today issued a request for public comment on exchange-traded funds (ETFs) seeking to invest in innovative asset classes or engage in novel investment strategies. The request focuses on ways to facilitate innovation…

entry.title: SEC Publishes Updated Market Statistics, Highlighting Increase in IPOs and Proceeds Raised
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission’s Division of Economic and Risk Analysis (DERA) published updated statistics and data visualizations covering key segments of the U.S. capital markets, including three new asset-backed securities (ABS) issuance data…

entry.title: SEC Names Paul Knight as Chief Operating Officer
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today announced that Paul Knight has been named as the agency’s Chief Operating Officer (COO).As COO, Mr. Knight will oversee the SEC's operational and administrative functions, including the agency's Office of…

entry.title: SEC Forms New Retail Fraud Working Group
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today announced the creation of the Retail Fraud Working Group designed to strengthen the Division of Enforcement’s efforts to identify and combat fraud targeting everyday investors.The Retail Fraud Working Group…

entry.title: SEC Small Business Advisory Committee to Explore Modernizing Market Access
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission’s Small Business Capital Formation Advisory Committee announced that it will hold a meeting on Tuesday, July 21, 2026 at 10 a.m. to explore ways to modernize public market access and encourage IPOs…

entry.title: SEC to Host Virtual Roundtable on Modernizing IPOs and Expanding Access to Public Markets
entry.content: The Securities and Exchange Commission’s Office of the Advocate for Small Business Capital Formation and the Division of Corporation Finance will co-host a livestreamed discussion on Monday, July 13, 2026, at 2 p.m. to re-examine…
